name: Alfredo
steps: Open bag; squeeze to get all product out.
Pour alfredo into lined amber 1/6 pans.
Lid + day dot on each pan; place in cooler.

name: Asian Slaw
steps: Mix mayo and sesame ginger until smooth.
Add mixture to slaw mix; stir well.
Label and refrigerate. Transfer to squeeze bottle for service.

name: Bell Peppers
steps: Rinse peppers thoroughly.
Halve top-to-bottom; remove core, seeds, membrane.
Quarter and dice skin-side-up in the dicer.
Portion into shallow 1/6 pan with lid; day dot; cooler.

name: Blue Cheese Crumbles
steps: Portion 2 oz into black togo ramekins with lids.
Place portions in 1/3 pan with lid; day dot; cooler.

name: Celery
steps: Cut ends off; wash well.
Cut into 4" pieces; halve wide stalks.
Day dot each pan; cooler.

name: Cheese Sauce
steps: Open bag; work product out.
Pour into lined amber 1/6 pans.
Lid + day dot; cooler.

name: Chili
steps: Sauté onions, peppers, tomatoes, bacon in margarine until tender; move to pot.
Brown beef on flat top with Tony's; strain grease; add to pot.
Add chili seasoning + ketchup; mix well.
Add water + canned tomatoes; boil, then simmer 30 min.
Pour into lined 1/6 pans; ice bath, stirring every 10–15 min.
Cover, date, label; walk-in.

name: Egg Rolls
steps: Layer frozen eggrolls in 1/3 pan with deli wrap between; lid.
Day dot; cooler.

name: Garlic Parmesan Sauce
steps: Mix both in stainless bowl.
Store in 1/6 pan or 2 oz ramekins with lids.
Lid + day dot; cooler.

name: Gravy
steps: Open can; pour into lined amber 1/6 pans; scrape can.
Lid + day dot; cooler.

name: Kid Mac
steps: Portion equally into 2 lined 1/6 pans.
Low usage: scoop 6 oz portions into togo squats with lids.
Label, date; cooler.

name: Burger Lettuce
steps: Core, halve; BLUE Saber King shredder (1/4" shreds).
Ice bath in drain-insert lexan; rinse; drain.
Bag, squeeze air out, tie; day dot; cooler.

name: Iceberg Lettuce (chopped)
steps: Core, halve; GREEN Saber King chopper (1"×1").
Ice bath; rinse; drain.
Bag, tie, day dot; cooler.

name: Romaine Lettuce (chopped)
steps: Core, halve; GREEN Saber King chopper (1"×1").
Ice bath; rinse; drain.
Bag, tie, day dot; cooler.

name: Salad Mix
steps: Prep iceberg + romaine per their cards.
Mix in deep lexan; add spring mix; toss well.
Bag, tie, day dot; cooler.

name: Mahi Mahi
steps: Unpack into 1/3 pan with drip, max 2 layers.
Saran wrap pressed tight to keep air out.
Day dot; cooler.

name: Marinara
steps: Open can; pour into lined amber 1/6 pans; scrape can.
Lid + day dot; cooler.

name: Mashed Potatoes
steps: Open bag; pour into lined amber 1/6 pans; squeeze bag.
Lid + day dot; cooler.

name: Diced Onions
steps: Slice ends, peel outer layer; quarter.
ORANGE Saber King blade, dice skin-side-up.
Into 1/6 pan with lid; day dot; cooler.

name: Parmesan Cheese
steps: Portion 1 oz into black togo ramekins with lids.
Place in 1/3 pan with lid; day dot; cooler.

name: New Pasta
steps: Thaw frozen pasta (cooks best thawed).
Portion to 7 oz; place in 1/3 pan.
Label, date; cooler.

name: Pickles
steps: Drain in colander.
Portion 4 oz into portion bags; roll tight.
Place in 1/3 pan with lid; day dot; cooler.

name: Pico de Gallo
steps: Mix all in stainless bowl.
Store in plastic 1/6 pan; lid + day dot; cooler.

name: Pimento Cheese
steps: Mix all in stainless bowl.
Store in line-ready pan or 1/3 cup portions.
Lid + day dot; cooler.

name: Pow Pow Shrimp Sauce
steps: Mix in stainless bowl; scrape into 1/6 pan.
Lid + day dot; cooler.

name: Quesadilla Meat
steps: Brown patty with onions on FLAT TOP only — never charbroiler; no leftover patties. No pickles yet.
Strain; cool; grease drips off.
Bag portion with 1 oz diced pickles (bulk: 5 oz cooked meat + onions per portion).
1/3 pan; label, date; cooler.

name: Mugshots Queso Dip
steps: Cube cheese into lined amber 1/6 pan; microwave 2–3 min.
Brown beef on flat top; drain; add.
Add remaining ingredients to pan; mix.
Cover, day dot; cooler.

name: Ranch Dressing
steps: Mix buttermilk + packets; whip in mayo until smooth.
Stage into cambro or 1/6 pans; scrape bowl.
Lid + day dot; cooler.

name: Rotel Cheese Sauce
steps: Cut cheese into 2" cubes.
Split cubes between 2 lined pans; split rotel + liquid evenly.
Lid + day dot; cooler.

name: Grilled Shrimp
steps: 8 shrimp per portion bag; roll tight.
1/3 pan with drip + lid; day dot; cooler.

name: Pow Pow Shrimp
steps: 8 oz frozen shrimp per portion bag; roll tight.
1/3 pan with lid; day dot; FREEZER.

name: Shrooms
steps: Rinse thoroughly.
Portion 4 oz into portion bags.
Back into case box.

name: Sriracha Mayo
steps: Whisk all together.
Covered cambro or 1/6 pan; label; refrigerate.
Squeeze bottle for service.

name: Diced Tomatoes
steps: Dice ends skin-side-up in dicer (ORANGE blade if whole).
1/6 pan with drip + lid; day dot; cooler.

name: Sliced Tomatoes
steps: Wash; core with tomato corer.
RED Saber King to slice.
Stack usable slices in pan w/ drip + lid; ends → diced tomatoes.
Day dot; cooler.

name: Turkey
steps: Weigh 6 oz portions into bags; roll tight.
Shallow 1/3 pan with drip + lid; day dot; cooler.

name: Veggie Mix
steps: Wash produce; slice squash + zucchini 1/4".
Trim onion, quarter, slice 1/4"; save center for diced prep.
Portion bags, tight; pan with lid; date; cooler.

name: Mozzarella Wedges
steps: Mix crumbs + parsley in hotel pan; mix breading + buttermilk into batter.
Slice mozzarella 1/4"; cut diagonally into 4 triangles per slice.
Batter, then coat in crumb mix.
Layer in 8 qt container with deli paper between layers.
Lid + day dot; FREEZER.

name: Pepperjack Cheese Wedges
steps: Mix crumbs + parsley; mix breading + buttermilk into batter.
Slice 1/4"; cut into 4 equal squares per slice.
Batter, then coat.
Layer with deli paper; lid + day dot; FREEZER.

name: Blanched Wings
steps: Rinse thawed wings in lexan drip.
Fry 5 min (25/large basket, 15/small); timer.
Sheet trays, single layer; wrap pan; speed rack in freezer.
30 min timer — pull at 40°F; DO NOT freeze (manager involved).
Cooler until portioned. Cook 5 more min for service.

name: Frozen Margarita Bulk
steps: Dissolve sour mix in water in large cambro.
Add remaining items; mix well.
Add to frozen beverage machine — ready in ~30 min.
Serve in 10 oz or 22 oz mug with salted rim.

name: Frozen Tropical 'Rita Bulk
steps: Dissolve sour mix in water in large cambro.
Add remaining items; mix well.
Frozen beverage machine — ready in ~30 min.
Sugar mug rim (10/22 oz), add strawberry puree, frozen margarita on top.

name: Frozen Strawberry Margarita
steps: Pour daiquiri mix in tin; add frozen margarita.
Pour tin-to-tin twice.
Frozen mug with sugar rim; lime wedge garnish.

name: Firecracker Popper Dog
steps: Spread popper mixture evenly on right inside half of bun.
Grilled hot dog in.
6 fried jalapeño slices on the cream cheese.
Sprinkle 2 chopped bacon slices on top.
Serve with 6 oz fries.

name: Classic Dog
steps: Grilled dog in toasted bun.
Drizzle ketchup + mustard; 1 Tbsp red onion.
1 oz pickle relish on the side.
Serve with 6 oz fries.

name: Chicago-ish Freedom Dog
steps: Layer left in order: mustard, pickles, onion, tomatoes.
Tuck pickle spear along the right of the dog.
Sport peppers on top; sprinkle celery salt.
Serve with 6 oz fries.

name: Southern Dog
steps: Build heated pimento cheese portion onto dog.
4 fried pickles on top.
Sprinkle 1 chopped bacon slice over pickles.
Serve with 6 oz fries.

name: The Colony Classic
steps: Guest picks one entrée from the list.
Fried Chicken Salad: red onion, tomatoes, cheese, croutons, house-made ranch.

name: The Freedom Feast
steps: Any two single smashburgers.
Two beer-battered fries.
One Firecracker Bites appetizer — guest picks from the bites list.

name: Classic Smash
steps: Double-stacked patties, beer-battered fries.

name: Firecracker Bites
steps: Guest picks ONE Firecracker Bite — happy hour portion, $3 with any entrée purchase.
Ring one per entrée; full builds live under SmashBurger LTO Builds (Firecracker Boneless Wangs, Firecracker Wedges).

name: Southern Key Lime Pie Rita
steps: Combine frozen rita, soft serve shake, and tequila in mixing tin; spindle mix 5 seconds.
Pour into 16 oz pint glass rimmed with graham cracker crumbs.
Top with whipped cream + 1 Tbsp graham crumbs; garnish lime wedge and cherry.

name: Rocket Pop Rita
steps: Combine frozen rita, shake, tequila, and blue curaçao in mixing tin; spindle mix 5 seconds.
Pour into 16 oz pint glass rimmed with red/white/blue sugar.
Top with strawberry puree + whipped cream; sprinkle sugars; garnish cherry.

name: Rocket Pop Shake
steps: Combine soft serve shake and blue curaçao in mixing tin; spindle mix 5 seconds.
Pour into 10 oz mug rimmed with red/white/blue sugar.
Top with strawberry puree + whipped cream; sprinkle sugars; garnish cherry.

name: Kentucky Buck
steps: Build bourbon, schnapps, and fresh lemon; top with ginger beer.
Sweet, rich, all southern — offer with the Southern Smash.

name: Strawberry Lemon Twist
steps: Build vodka, strawberry puree, and lemon juice; top with Sprite.
Bright, crisp, refreshing — offer with the Savell Smash.

name: Texas Ranch Water
storage: Tajín-rimmed glass · pairs w/ Texan Smash
steps: Build tequila and lime over ice in a Tajín-rimmed glass.
Top with Topo Chico. Spicy, bold — offer with the Texan Smash.

name: Middleberger
steps: Dress bottom bun: mayo & mustard, red onion, pickles, lettuce, tomato.
Beef patty on top.
2 packets ketchup with every order of fries.

name: Pato
steps: Build like a Middle.
Top the patty with 2 oz chili and 2 oz rotel.

name: Stu
steps: Dress bottom bun.
Patty, then 2 oz mushrooms and a slice of swiss.

name: Gamble
steps: Sour cream + jalapeños + lettuce on bottom bun.
Patty, BBQ, bacon, cheddar on top.

name: McDowell
steps: Ranch on bottom bun, onion, lettuce, tomato.
Patty, bacon, cheddar.

name: Savell
steps: Dress the bottom bun.
Patty and bacon on top.

name: Anthony's Peanut Butter Burger
steps: Peanut butter on the bottom bun; patty on top.

name: Steak Burger
steps: Dress bottom bun.
Patty with philly set, sautéed onions & peppers, swiss.

name: A1 Sauce Burger
steps: Comeback, lettuce, tomato on bottom bun.
Patty, A1, bacon, cheddar on top.

name: Comeback Burger
steps: Comeback on bottom bun, onion, lettuce, tomato.
Patty, bacon, pepperjack, onion ring on top.

name: Garlic Parm Burger
steps: Mayo on bottom bun.
Patty, garlic parm, bacon, shrooms, O-strings.

name: Mac & Cheese Burger
steps: Patty between two grilled cheeses.
Top with bacon and mac & cheese.
Do not cut.

name: Mugshot Burger
steps: Stack all three dressed patties.
Skewer with onion ring and fried pickles.
NOT available for carry-out.

name: Patty Melt
steps: Comeback on sourdough.
Patty, sautéed onions, both cheeses.
Do not cut.

name: Southern Burger
steps: Lettuce + tomato on bottom bun.
Patty, bacon, melted pimento, fried pickles.

name: Texan Burger
steps: Dress bottom bun.
Patty, pepperjack, O-strings, fried jalapeños.

name: Big Kahuna
steps: Lettuce + tomato on bottom bun.
Patty, bacon, grilled pineapple, teriyaki.

name: Hicks
ing: chopped & grilled w/ 1 oz red onions
steps: Dress bottom bun.
Chop and grill philly meat with onions; top with swiss.

name: Philly
ing: w/ 1 oz red onions + 1 oz bell peppers
steps: Dress bottom bun.
Grill philly set with onions & peppers; top with swiss.

name: Southwest Philly
steps: Comeback + lettuce on bottom bun.
Philly set, rotel, pico on top.

name: Callie's Mahi
steps: Comeback, lettuce, tomato on bottom bun.
Blackened mahi with american cheese.

name: Turkey Burger
steps: Dress bottom bun; turkey patty with american cheese on top.

name: Briscoe
steps: Ranch, lettuce, tomato on bottom bun.
3 sauced strips topped with swiss.

name: Inferno Wrap
steps: Mic tortilla 15 sec; build.
Grill cheese-side down 30 sec each side.
Cut diagonally and shingle.

name: Philly Wrap
steps: Mic tortilla 15 sec; build.
Grill 30 sec each side; cut and shingle.

name: Teriyaki Wrap
steps: Mic tortilla 15 sec; build.
Grill 30 sec each side; cut and shingle.

name: Caitlin's Cajun
steps: Dress bottom bun.
Blackened breast, bacon, pepperjack.

name: Turkey Club
steps: Build on sourdough.
Cut before serving.

name: Mombo Combo Build
ing: 3 — wedges 3 ea · eggrolls 2 rolls · tenders 3 · pickles/shrooms 4 oz
match sauce to app — 2 oz each
steps: Plate all three on lined burger basket.
If eggrolls are a selection, only cut by request.

name: Seans Nachos
shelf: Basket of chips, fries or tots
steps: Base of chips, fries or tots.
Layer chili, rotel, pico, jalapeños, sour cream.

name: Pow Pow Shrimp Build
ing: 8 oz, tossed in Pow Pow sauce
steps: Toss shrimp in Pow Pow; serve on salad-mix bed.
To-go: Pow Pow and sriracha on the side.

name: Chicken Basket
ing: 6 — knuckled, double battered, fried or grilled
steps: Fry (or grill) 6 tenders; basket with fries and sauce.

name: Chips 'n
storage: Mugshots Squat Cup on Lined Burger Basket
steps: Ladle 6 oz of chosen dip into squat cup.
Serve with basket of chips.

name: Cheese Wedges
storage: Lined Wire Basket on Lined Burger Basket
steps: Fry wedges; basket with 2 oz marinara.

name: Southwest Eggrolls Build
storage: Lined Wire Basket on Lined Burger Basket
ing: 3 rolls, cut in half corner to corner
steps: Fry; cut corner to corner.
To-go: do not cut unless guest requests.

name: Wangs
storage: Lined Wire Basket on Lined Burger Basket
ing: Mild · Hot · BBQ · Teriyaki · Sesame Ginger · Lemon Pepper · Carolina Gold · Honey Hot · Sweet Chili · Mango Habanero · Garlic Parm
steps: Fry and toss in sauce.
1 ranch + 2 celery per 5 wings.

name: Davis’ Dill Pickles
storage: Lined Wire Basket on Lined Burger Basket
steps: Batter and fry 8 oz pickles.
Serve with 2 oz comeback.

name: Shrooms Build
storage: Lined Wire Basket on Lined Burger Basket
steps: Batter and fry 8 oz mushrooms.
Serve with 2 oz ranch.

name: Chili Build
storage: Squat Cup on Red Saucer or Blue Bowl on Red Plate
steps: Ladle chili; top with cheese and onions.
To-go: Mugs cups + crackers in to-go box.

name: She-E-O
steps: Mayo + lettuce on bottom bun.
Patty, waffle fries, cheese sauce, pico.

name: Guthrie's Godfather
steps: Garlic mayo on bottom bun.
Patty, mozz wedges, marinara, pesto on bun.

name: Breakfast Burger
steps: Dress bottom bun.
Patty, bacon, american, fried egg on top.

name: Quesadilla
steps: Cheese side down on flat top, 30 sec each side.
To-go: pico on quesadilla, sriracha mayo in 2 oz ramekin.

name: Rajun Cajun Salad
steps: Build greens and toppings.
Top with sliced blackened chicken; garnish.

name: Buffalo Bleu Salad
steps: Toss strips in mild; cut and place on greens.
Bleu cheese and parsley on top.

name: Cheeseburger Bowl
shelf: 4 oz salad mix + 1 oz shredded lettuce
ing: 7 oz, Tony’s, chopped like ground beef
2 oz, drizzled + combined on flat top
steps: Toss greens with comeback.
Chop patty on flat top; combine with cheese sauce.
Top with pickles, waffle fries, cheese, pico, bacon.

name: Teriyaki Bowl
shelf: 4 oz salad mix + 3 oz asian slaw
steps: Build greens and slaw.
Cut tenders bite-size; drizzle teriyaki across bowl.

name: Side House Salad
steps: Build and top with croutons.
Side salads get 1 dressing on the side.

name: Cajun Pasta
steps: Toss penne with alfredo and tomatoes.
Blackened chicken on top; garnish; toast on edge.

name: Parm Pasta
steps: Toss penne with alfredo; marinara over.
Cut strips on top; parm + parsley; toast on edge.

name: Blackened Shrimp Pasta
steps: Toss penne with alfredo and tomatoes.
8 blackened shrimp on top; parm + parsley; toast.

name: Philly Pasta
ing: w/ 1 oz bell peppers + 1 oz onions, flat top
steps: Cook philly set on flat top.
Toss with pasta & cheese sauce BEFORE plating.

name: Hamburger Steak Plate
steps: Patty with mushrooms on top.
Mashed potatoes with gravy · 2 sides total.

name: Blackened Mahi Plate
steps: Blackened mahi with grilled veggies.
Mahi plate only has ONE side.

name: Bishop Burger
ing: standard Middleberger build — any burger except Mac-N-Cheese or Steak Burger
steps: Build like a mini Middleberger unless requested otherwise.

name: Kayla's Mini Chicken Basket
ing: 3 — knuckled, double battered, fried or grilled
steps: Fry or grill 3 tenders; basket with fries.

name: Emma's Grilled Cheese
steps: Grill; cut in half; pickle slice on each half.

name: Hailey's Egg Sandwich
steps: Fried egg on kid bun.

name: Meg's Mac-N-Cheese
storage: Squat Cup on Burger Basket w/ Liner
steps: Scoop mac into squat cup.
Optional chopped tender on top.

name: Peanut Butter-N-Jelly
steps: PB on one slice, jelly on the other.
Do NOT grill; cut in half.

name: Taylor's Mini Pasta
ing: choice of alfredo or marinara, tossed
optional, grilled or fried, on top
steps: Toss pasta in chosen sauce.
Serve on the liner (Tay’s Pasta).

name: Duncan's Quesadilla
steps: Cut tortilla in half; cheese on tortilla on flat top ~1.5 min; fold.
30 sec each side; cut in equal halves and shingle at the point.

name: Dessert Nachos
steps: Fry, drain, toss in cinnamon sugar.
Scoop of ice cream + both drizzles on top.
To-go: sauces 2 oz each, scoop on side.

name: Bread Puddin' Bites
steps: Fry 2 minutes; toss in cinnamon sugar.

name: Root Beer Float
steps: Root beer in frosted mug; ice cream on top.
To-go: cup 3/4 full, scoop on the side.

name: Sriracha Ranch
steps: Combine all ingredients in a large mixing bowl and whisk together.
Scrape into a 1/6 pan with a rubber spatula and cover.
Label and place in cooler until needed.

name: Sliced Jalapeños
steps: Rinse whole jalapeños and allow to dry to prevent slipping.
Slice across into 1/4" rounds (width of a pencil); discard the stem cap.
Place in shallow 1/6 pan and cover; label; cooler.

name: Queso Portions
steps: Heat flat top to 375°.
Cook patties, seasoning with Tony's while breaking apart; cook through.
Strain to fully drain grease; cool to 40°.
Weigh 2 oz portions into 3.25 portion cups; add 2 tsp pickled jalapeño juice each; lid.
Place in shallow 1/4 pan; label and date; cooler.

name: Brined Chicken Tenders
steps: In a 22 qt Cambro: water, salt, sugar; whisk until dissolved.
Add tenders; cover, label; walk-in.
Brine 12–14 hours.
Drain fully (drip lexan or colander).
Deep 1/3 pan with drip insert; cover, label; cooler.

name: Blackened Chicken Tenders
steps: Whisk butter + blackening spice until NOT lumpy.
Coat brined tenders thoroughly in a 1/2 pan; cover; marinate in walk-in.
Cook on heated flat top to 165° internal.
Cool fully on sheet tray with cling wrap.
Cut each tender into 6 cubes (once lengthwise, twice across).
Portion 5 oz; label; cooler.

name: Brined Chicken Breast
steps: In an 8 qt Cambro: water, salt, sugar; whisk until dissolved.
Pound 10 breasts and add to brine; cover, label; walk-in.
Brine 8–12 hours.
Drain fully in colander.
Deep 1/3 pan with drip insert; cover, label; cooler.

name: Blackened Chicken Breast
steps: Whisk butter + seasoning in large stainless bowl until well blended.
Add brined breasts, coating well.
Place in 1/2 pan, cover; day dot; cooler.

name: Monster Cookie Prep
steps: Divide the cookie into 4 quarters.
Finely chop one quarter into coarse ground crumbles.
Place the crumbled 1/4 cookie into 2 oz ramekin and top with lid — one cookie = 2 crumble portions.
Individually wrap the remaining quarters in plastic wrap (used for garnish); place on top of portioned crumbles in a deep 1/4 pan.
Label and date container; place in cooler until ready to use.

name: Mugs Signature Sauce
steps: Charred jalapeños: cut tops off, remove seeds; char on flat top under burger press ~10 min, turning for even blistering; cool slightly, finely mince.
Whisk mayo + mustard in a large stainless bowl until fully smooth.
Add remaining ingredients (incl. minced jalapeños); whisk until thoroughly incorporated.
Pour into third pan with spatula; cover, label, and store.
Quality: light orange-red with visible jalapeño specks; smooth and creamy.

name: 10 oz Mugshots Milkshake
steps: Add half & half and any flavoring to mixing tin.
Add 2 – #8 scoops vanilla ice cream.
Blend on shake mixer until no lumps.
Pour into frosted 10 oz mug; top with whipped cream and a cherry.
Monster Cookie shake: garnish with a cookie quarter.
Serve with jumbo straw.

name: 22 oz Mugshots Milkshake
steps: Add half & half and any flavoring to mixing tin.
Add 4 – #8 scoops vanilla ice cream.
Blend on shake mixer until no lumps.
Pour into frosted 22 oz mug; top with whipped cream and a cherry.
Monster Cookie shake: garnish with a cookie quarter.
Serve with jumbo straw.

name: Colony Wangs
steps: Fry wings; serve naked or tossed in 2 oz mild or hot — other sauces also available.
Serve with 6 oz fries.

name: Firecracker Boneless Wangs
steps: Bread chicken chunks: breader, buttermilk, breader.
Fry 3 minutes; pull and drain in Sav-a-Day.
Serve naked or tossed in 2 oz sauce; ranch + celery on side.

name: Firecracker Wedges
steps: Fry wedges golden.
Serve in small bowl with liner, 2 oz marinara on side.

name: New Cajun Salad
steps: Base of salad mix; add onions, tomatoes, cheese.
Top with fried boneless wangs and croutons.
Serve with 2 oz ranch on the side.

name: Single Classic Smash
ing: 1/2 Tbsp bottom bun + 1/2 Tbsp top bun
steps: Dress bottom bun: signature sauce, sautéed onions, pickles.
Single smash patty topped with American cheese.
Finish top bun with 1/2 Tbsp signature sauce. Serve with 6 oz fries.

name: Savell SmashBurger
steps: Place 1 slice cheddar on one patty.
Place 2 slices bacon and 1 slice cheddar on the other patty.
Place patty with bacon on top of the other patty.
Squirt a little water NEXT TO the patties and cover both with dome ~10–15 seconds.
Remove from flat top and place on dressed bottom bun.
Serve with 6 oz fries.

name: McDowell SmashBurger
steps: Place 1 slice cheddar on one patty.
Place 1 tbsp BBQ, 2 slices bacon, & 1 slice cheddar on the other patty.
Place patty with bacon on top of the other patty.
Squirt a little water NEXT TO the patties and cover both with dome ~10–15 seconds.
Remove from flat top and place on dressed bottom bun.
Serve with 6 oz fries.

name: Texan SmashBurger
steps: Place 1 slice pepperjack on one patty.
Place 1 slice pepperjack on the other patty.
Place one patty on top of the other patty.
Squirt a little water NEXT TO the patties and cover both with dome ~10–15 seconds.
Remove from flat top and place on dressed bottom bun.
Top with fried onion strings + fried jalapeños. Serve with 6 oz fries.

name: Southern SmashBurger
steps: Place 1/2 pimento cheese portion on one patty.
Place 2 slices bacon & 1/2 pimento cheese portion on the other patty.
Place patty with bacon on top of the other patty.
Squirt a little water NEXT TO the patties and cover both with dome ~10–15 seconds.
Remove from flat top and place on dressed bottom bun.
Top with fried pickles. Serve with 6 oz fries.

name: Signature SmashBurger
steps: Place 2 slices bacon and 1 slice American cheese on one patty.
Place 1 slice American cheese on the other patty.
Place patty with bacon on top of the other patty.
Squirt a little water NEXT TO the patties and cover both with dome ~8–10 seconds.
Remove from flat top and place on dressed bottom bun.
Finish with 1/2 tbsp Mugs Signature Sauce on top. Serve with 6 oz fries.
